description_long: This rifle features a modern, angular design with a predominantly light gray body accented by blue and purple panels, giving it a futuristic appearance. The stock is fixed and robust, extending straight back from the main body, while the grip and trigger area are integrated into the lower section. The upper receiver includes a rail system, likely for mounting optics or accessories, and the barrel is short and compact, protruding slightly from the front. Copper-colored elements, possibly representing internal mechanisms or decorative features, are visible along the top and side. The magazine is box-shaped and seamlessly integrated into the lower receiver, suggesting a detachable box magazine design. The overall construction appears to be primarily polymer with some metallic components, emphasizing durability and lightweight handling.
description: A futuristic, angular rifle with a light gray body, blue and purple accents, and a fixed stock. Features a short barrel, integrated rail, and a detachable box magazine.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the side, highlighting its angular body, fixed stock, and the blue and purple color accents along the upper and lower receiver.
description_view_1: This top-down view emphasizes the rail system, copper-colored internal details, and the overall width of the stock and handguard.
description_view_2: The opposite side view shows the short barrel, integrated magazine, and the continuation of the color accents, with more detail on the grip and trigger area.
description_view_3: A front-angled view reveals the muzzle, the compactness of the barrel, and the alignment of the stock and receiver, with visible copper and purple highlights.
